data.title: Birkenstock Shares Jump After Strong Earnings Beat, Raised Outlook
data.description:
Shares of Birkenstock jumped more than 5% in pre-market trading after the firm reported Q2 revenue of €574. 3 million.

data.title: Ukraine weighs adding Bitcoin to national reserves amid war and financial uncertainty
data.description:
15-5-2025 – Ukraine’s parliament is contemplating legislation that would establish Bitcoin as a component of its national reserves, though the proposal faces significant hurdles amid the nation’s ongoing conflict with Russia. The groundbreaking initiative, unveiled at Kyiv’s CRYPTO 2025 conference, follows in the wake of similar moves by other nations, including America’s recent policy shift [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/ukraine-weighs-adding-bitcoin-to-national-reserves-amid-war-and-financial-uncertainty/

data.title: Pi Network invests $100M in startups building blockchain apps
data.description:
Mobile-first blockchain Pi Network has launched a $100 million fund to invest in initiatives built on its infrastructure. According to a May 14 announcement, the Pi Foundation is launching Pi Network Ventures with an initial investment of $100 million in Pi (PI) tokens and US dollars. The fund will invest in startups and businesses building on Pi Network or contributing to its broader ecosystem. “This strategic program intends to invest in high-quality startups and companies across sectors, driving innovation and ecosystem growth,” Pi Network said in an X post
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/pi-network-s-team-launches-100-m-fund-to-invest-in-ecosystem?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Al Abraaj Restaurants Group Adopts Bitcoin Financial Strategy
data.description: According to Foresight News, Al Abraaj Restaurants Group, a Middle Eastern company listed on the Bahrain Stock Exchange under the ticker ABRAAJ, has announced its decision to implement a Bitcoin financial strategy. This move marks a significant shift in the company's approach to financial management, reflecting a growing trend among businesses in the region to integrate cryptocurrency into their operations.

data.title: US President Trump: Trade discussed in talks on India-Pakistan dispute
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said that he had told India and Pakistan that they should resolve the dispute through trade rather than war, and both sides were satisfied with this. Trade issues were discussed in the talks on the dispute between India and Pakistan. (Jinshi)

data.title: SWIFT to Begin Digital Assets Integration in November 2025
data.description:
Digital assets are going to make a giant step forward. From November 2025, SWIFT will start live trials for using digital assets and currency transactions, transferring over $150 trillion yearly. This is a significant step toward making digital assets compatible with traditional finance worldwide
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/swift-to-begin-digital-assets-integration-in-november-2025/

data.title: Metamask Lead Dev Hints At Token: Best Crypto to Buy Now
data.description:
MetaMask, one of the oldest EVM wallet, trough its co-founder, Dan Finlay, hinted at the possibility of a native token, bringing excitement after years of stagnancy. After a good few years, some argue that MetaMask is getting slower, and many competitors, like Rabby and Best surface with innovations. Although this isn’t the first time MetaMask.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/presales/metamask-lead-dev-hints-at-token-best-crypto-to-buy-now/

data.title: Abraaj Becomes First Public Company in the Middle East to Adopt Bitcoin Financial Strategy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Cointelegrah, Abraaj has become the first listed company in the Middle East to adopt a Bitcoin financial strategy. The Abraaj Group is a company operating on six continents. The company was founded by Pakistani businessman Arif Naqvi and is headquartered in Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

data.title: SUN completed the 42nd token repurchase and destruction, with the cumulative destruction exceeding 500 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Sun.io officially completed the 42nd token repurchase and destruction from April 17 to May 15, 2025, destroying a total of 3,604,388.6187 SUN tokens, and the relevant tokens have been transferred to the black hole address. Data shows that since December 15, 2021 (Singapore time), a total of 502,577,256.07 SUN tokens have been repurchased and destroyed, of which 341,562,185.91 were destroyed through SunSwap V2 income and 161,015,070.16 were destroyed through SunPump income. This repurchase and destruction mechanism effectively increased the scarcity of SUN tokens and created long-term value for coin holders.

data.title: BNSOL Super Staking Launches on LAYER
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, BNSOL Super Stake launched Solayer (LAYER): those holding BNSOL and DeFi BNSOL assets can obtain LAYER APR airdrop rewards.

data.title: Galaxy Digital’s associated address deposited 17.82 million ENA to Binance in the past three hours, equivalent to approximately $6.73 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ai Yi, an analyst on the chain, the Galaxy Digital associated address has recharged 17.82 million ENA to Binance in the past three hours, worth $6.73 million.
The address withdrew 22.64 million tokens from major exchanges at an average price of $0.5258 from 2024.10 to 2025.02. If it is sold this time, it will lose $2.64 million.

data.title: MoonPay, Mastercard Partner For Global Stablecoin Payment Card: Explore New Crypto To Buy!
data.description:
MoonPay has teamed up with Mastercard to launch a new suite of stablecoin payment cards. This is a significant move because it will enable seamless digital asset spending at over 150 million merchants worldwide. Announced on 15 May 2025, this collaboration follows MoonPay’s recent acquisition of Iron’s infrastructure – responsible for building API-first stablecoin infrastructure.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/moonpay-mastercard-partner-for-global-stablecoin-payment-card-explore-new-crypto-to-buy/

data.title: BNB Surpasses 650 USDT with a Narrowed 0.65% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On May 15, 2025, 09:53 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 650 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 650.340027 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.65% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Binance Wallet TGE will be listed on Alaya AI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Wallet TGE 17th phase launched Alaya AI (AGT): Subscription time: May 16, 2025, 3 pm to 5 pm (UTC+8) Subscription qualifications: Starting from this TGE, eligible users must use Binance Alpha points to participate. An additional 200,000,000 AGT will be used for future activities, and specific details will be announced separately.

data.title: Cathie Wood’s Ark Invest buys $9.4 million worth of eToro shares on Nasdaq debut, sells $7.9 million of its own Bitcoin ETF
data.description:
Ark also bought $7. 6 million of 3IQ's Solana staking ETF and sold shares in Jack Dorsey's Block as it rebalanced its fund weightings.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/354440/cathie-wood-ark-invest-buys-etoro-solana-etf-sells-bitcoin-etf-block?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
